internal.content:
---
title: IBM Fusion AI
description: IBM Fusion AI
tabs: [Overview, Tutorials, Resources]
---

import { principlesSection } from '../../styles/Grid.module.scss';
import {Insights } from '@carbon/pictograms-react';

<PageDescription>

Articles, blogs, and videos sharing insights, best practices, and real‑world experiences with IBM Fusion for AI.

</PageDescription>
{/* 
<AnchorLinks>
  <AnchorLink>Build</AnchorLink>
  <AnchorLink>Run</AnchorLink>
  <AnchorLink>Bring Your Data</AnchorLink>
</AnchorLinks>
 */}

<Row className={principlesSection}>
</Row>


<Row className="resource-card-group-3-across">
  <Column colMd={4} colLg={4} noGutterSm>
    <ResourceCard
     subTitle="Blog"
     title="Getting Started with Redhat OpenShift AI with Fusion Data Foundation"
     aspectRatio="2:1"
     actionIcon="launch"
     href="https://community.ibm.com/community/user/blogs/rupali3/2026/02/03/getting-started-with-openshift-ai-with-fusion-data"
    />
  </Column>
 <Column colMd={4} colLg={4} noGutterSm>
   <ResourceCard
     subTitle="Blog"
     title="GitOps in Action: A Hands-On Guide to Argo CD Using a Dynamic Web Application"
     aspectRatio="2:1"
     actionIcon="launch"
     href="https://medium.com/towards-data-engineering/gitops-in-action-a-hands-on-guide-to-argo-cd-using-a-dynamic-web-application-a502f453b02f"
   />
 </Column>
  <Column colMd={4} colLg={4} noGutterSm>
    <ResourceCard
      subTitle="Blog"
      title="Building Enterprise LLMOps on IBM Fusion HCI with OpenShift AI"
      aspectRatio="2:1"
      actionIcon="launch"
      href="https://community.ibm.com/community/user/blogs/purnanand-kumar/2026/02/06/building-enterprise-llmops-on-ibm-fusion-hci"
    />
  </Column>
</Row>

<Row className="resource-card-group-3-across">
  <Column colMd={4} colLg={4} noGutterSm>
   <ResourceCard
     subTitle="Blog"
     title="Building Real-Time Fraud Detection on IBM Fusion HCI with Watsonx AI"
     aspectRatio="2:1"
     actionIcon="launch"
     href="https://community.ibm.com/community/user/blogs/rupali3/2026/02/04/fraud-detection-watsonxai-fusion-hci"
   />
  </Column>
  <Column colMd={4} colLg={4} noGutterSm>
    <ResourceCard
      subTitle="Blog"
      title="How to Integrate IBM CAS MCP with WatsonX Orchestrate"
      aspectRatio="2:1"
      actionIcon="launch"
      href="https://community.ibm.com/community/user/blogs/namita-singroha/2026/02/03/integrating-ibm-cas-with-watsonx-orchestrate-via-m"
    />
  </Column>
  <Column colMd={4} colLg={4} noGutterSm>
    <ResourceCard
      subTitle="Blog"
      title="How to deploy an AI Chat Server on IBM Fusion HCI with IBM Bob in 20 minutes"
      aspectRatio="2:1"
      actionIcon="launch"
      href="https://medium.com/@andretost_75145/how-to-deploy-an-ai-chat-server-on-an-ibm-fusion-hci-with-ibm-bob-in-20-minutes-without-typing-187d01700569"
    />
  </Column>

</Row>

<Row className="resource-card-group-3-across">
 <Column colMd={4} colLg={4} noGutterSm>
   <ResourceCard
     subTitle="Blog"
     title="How to Deploy NVIDIA AI-Q on IBM Fusion HCI"
     aspectRatio="2:1"
     actionIcon="launch"
     href="https://community.ibm.com/community/user/blogs/anushka-jaiswal/2026/01/21/deploying-nvidia-ai-q-on-ibm-fusion-hci"
   />
 </Column>
 <Column colMd={4} colLg={4} noGutterSm>
   <ResourceCard
     subTitle="Blog"
     title="Guide to deploy NVIDIA RAG Blueprint on IBM Fusion HCI"
     aspectRatio="2:1"
     actionIcon="launch"
     href="https://community.ibm.com/community/user/blogs/namita-singroha/2026/02/03/deploying-nvidia-rag-on-fusion-hci"
   />
 </Column>

</Row>

## Videos

<Row>
<Column colMd={4} colLg={4} noGutterMdLeft>
<ArticleCard
  title="Turnkey agentic AI with IBM Content-Aware Storage (CAS), MCP, and IBM watsonx Orchestrate."
  subTitle="Demo"
  href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XMYs0Qe-9Fk"
  actionIcon="launch"
>

![Turnkey agentic AI with IBM Content-Aware Storage (CAS), MCP, and IBM watsonx Orchestrate.](images/turnkey-agentic-ai.jpg)

</ArticleCard>
</Column>
</Row>

## Videos

<Row>
<Column colMd={4} colLg={4} noGutterMdLeft>
<ArticleCard
  title="Turnkey agentic AI with IBM Content-Aware Storage (CAS), MCP, and IBM watsonx Orchestrate."

![Turnkey agentic AI with IBM Content-Aware Storage (CAS), MCP, and IBM watsonx Orchestrate.](images/turnkey-agentic-ai.jpg)

</Row>
